title: Generating a Recursive Fibonacci Sequence
scenario: Write a function that generates the nth number in the recursive Fibonacci sequence. The input will be an integer n. The function should use recursion to calculate the nth number and should handle edge cases where n is less than 0.
constraints: Must use recursion to calculate the nth number
Must handle edge cases where n is less than 0

evaluationCriteria.description: The function implements the correct Fibonacci logic using recursion.
The function returns the correct nth number in the Fibonacci sequence.
The code adheres to standard Python syntax and formatting.
The function is implemented efficiently and uses the optimal number of recursive calls.
